title: The happiest country in the world — Costa Rica & the Happy Planet Index
content_html:
The happiest country in the world — Costa Rica & the Happy Planet Index

Children growing up in Costa Rica are surrounded by some of the most beautiful and diverse landscapes in the world. Preserving tropical rainforests isn't Costa Rica's only success, because the government also makes sure everyone has access to health-care and education. So when the New Economics Foundation released its second Happy Planet Index, Costa Rica came out number one. The index is a ranking of countries based on their impact on the environment and the health and happiness of their citizens.

According to Mariano Rojas, a Costa Rican economics professor, Costa Rica is a mid-income country where citizens have plenty of time for themselves and for their relationships with others. 'A mid-income level allows most citizens to satisfy their basic needs. The government makes sure that all Costa Ricans have access to education, health and nutrition services.' Costa Ricans, he believes, are not interested in status or spending money to show how successful they are.

Created in 2008, the Happy Planet Index examines happiness on a national level and ranks 143 countries according to three measurements: citizens' happiness, how long they live (which reflects their health), and how much of the planet's resources each country consumes. According to researcher Saamah Abdallah, the Index also measures the outcomes that are most important — happy, healthy lives for everyone.

(adapted from Yes! Magazine)

questions.question: The Happy Planet Index was created in the year 1 ________.
questions.groupHtml:
Questions 1–6

Complete the notes below.

Choose ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER from the passage for each answer.
questions.explanation: EN: 'Created in 2008, the Happy Planet Index...'. VI: 'Được tạo ra vào năm 2008, Chỉ số Hành tinh Hạnh phúc...'.

_blockConfig.noteContent:
**The Happy Planet Index**
Year started: [1] 
Number of countries it lists: [2] 
Measures each country’s happiness according to:
• its effect on the [3] (i.e. the quantity of the Earth’s [4] that it uses);
• the [5] of the population (i.e. how long people live);
• how happy its [6] are.

questions.questionHtml:
The Happy Planet Index

Year started: 1_______

Number of countries it lists: 2_______

Measures each country’s happiness according to:

  • its effect on the 3_______ (i.e. the quantity of the Earth’s 4_______ that it uses);
  • the 5_______ of the population (i.e. how long people live);
  • how happy its 6_______ are.

questions.question: The index ranks 2 ________ countries worldwide.
questions.explanation: EN: 'ranks 143 countries according to...'. VI: 'xếp hạng 143 quốc gia theo...'.

questions.question: It grades countries based on their impact on the 3 ________.
questions.explanation: EN: 'according to their impact on the environment'. VI: 'theo tác động của họ đối với môi trường'.

questions.question: It measures how much of the planet's 4 ________ each country consumes.
questions.explanation: EN: 'measures how much of the planet's resources each country consumes'. VI: 'đo lường lượng tài nguyên của hành tinh mà mỗi quốc gia tiêu thụ'.

questions.question: It evaluates how long people live, reflecting their 5 ________.
questions.explanation: EN: 'based on how long they live (which reflects their health)'. VI: 'dựa trên thời gian sống của họ (phản ánh sức khỏe của họ)'.

questions.question: It assesses the overall happiness of their 6 ________.
questions.explanation: EN: 'the health and happiness of their citizens'. VI: 'sức khỏe và hạnh phúc của công dân của họ'.
